input: Run maturity assessment on this project
expected_behavior: Skill activates and produces the expected maturity assessment output following the defined process
Skill recognizes the trigger phrase and executes the maturity assessment workflow

input: Apply maturity assessment to analyze the current codebase with detailed output
expected_behavior: Skill produces comprehensive maturity assessment analysis with evidence-tagged findings
Skill activates with minimal input, applies reasonable defaults

input: What is the weather forecast for tomorrow?
expected_behavior: Skill should NOT activate — this input has no relation to maturity assessment

input: Run maturity assessment but I have no files or documentation yet
expected_behavior: Skill handles gracefully — requests minimum viable input or produces gap analysis

input: Apply maturity assessment but requirements contradict each other
expected_behavior: Skill detects contradiction, flags with [OPEN] tag, proposes resolution
